name: Sweet Pareve Noodle Kugel
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Margarine (1 stick), cut into pieces
1 small can Crushed pineapple in its own juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-by-13-inch baking dish.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
3. Cook noodles in boiling salted water for 10 minutes; drain well.
4. Place hot noodles in a mixing bowl; add margarine and mix until melted.
5. In another bowl, stir together eggs, sugar, salt, vanilla, lemon juice, apricot preserves, crushed pineapple with juice, raisins, and apples.
6. Add to noodles along with the remaining ingredients.
7. Pour into prepared pan.
8. Sprinkle with corn flakes; stir together cinnamon and sugar and sprinkle on top.
9. Bake for 45 minutes to 1 hour, until lightly browned.
